title: Fishe
description: Fish for various fishe and perform fisheomancy
body:
# Fishe
Fish for various fishe that represent materials and mobs.

To get started make a copper fishing rod (a normal fishing rod but replace the sticks with copper) then a fisheonomicon by surrounding a book with 4 copper fishe.

Ferment fishe into fishe paste and use it to repair fishey tools and perform fisheomancy
Fisheomancy can conjure some rare items and all enchanting books
